usage: setAttribute [-help] [-max_fanout <integer>] [-reset] [-stripe_layer_range <integer:integer>] {-net <net_name> | -cell_pin <cell_name:pin_name> } [-sub_net <sub_net_name> [-comp_pin <comp<:pin_name> list>][-inst_pin <instance<:pin_name> list>]] [-weight <integer>] [-non_default_rule <rule_name>] [-non_default_rule_effort {auto|soft|hard|no_taper}] [-shield_net <special_net_name(s)>] [-shield_side <one_side|two_sides>] [[[-em_ndr_rule <rule_name>] [-em_ndr_dist <double>]] | [-em_width_rule <layer width:dist pairs>]] [-ndr_si_length_limit <layer dist pairs>] [-coaxial_shielded_layers <layer_number:layer_number>] [-coaxial_shield_limit <layer_number:layer_number>] [-coaxial_shield_interval <[integer|{layer_name:integer ...}]>] [-pattern {steiner|trunk}] [-top_preferred_routing_layer <layer_number>] [-bottom_preferred_routing_layer <layer_number>] [-top_preferred_shielding_layer <layer_number>] [-bottom_preferred_shielding_layer <layer_number>] [-preferred_routing_layer_effort {low|medium|high|hard}] [-preferred_extra_space <integer>] [-avoid_detour {true|false}] [-skip_routing {true|false}] [-skip_antenna_fix {true|false}] [-multi_cut_via_effort {low|medium|high}] [-si_post_route_fix {true|false}] [-min_stack_layer <layer_number>] [-stack_distance <distance>] [-mask <integer>] [-layer_mask <integer:integer>] [-one_side_spacing <integer:integer>]

options.name: -avoid_detour
options.description: Avoid routing detours for a net

options.name: -bottom_preferred_routing_layer
options.description: <layer_number> Bottom routing layer for the object

options.name: -bottom_preferred_shielding_layer
options.description: <layer_number> Bottom shielding layer for the object

options.name: -coaxial_shield_interval
options.description: <[integer|{layer_name:integer ...}]> Number of empty tracks between two crossties, 0..63, default is 0 or every track

options.name: -coaxial_shield_limit
options.description: <layer_number:layer_number> Bottom and top routing layer limit for coaxial shields

options.name: -coaxial_shielded_layers
options.description: <layer_number:layer_number> Bottom and top routing layer for coaxial shields

options.name: -em_ndr_dist
options.description: EM ndr rule source to sink distance

options.name: -em_width_rule
options.description: Table of layer width:distance pairs, "M1 1.0:0.5, M2 2.0:1.0"

options.name: -layer_mask
options.description: Specify the layer range that the mask constraint should be applied on. For example, 3:4 means that the constraint should be applied on M3 and M4.

options.name: -mask
options.description: Mask constraint setting for the net. Legal values are from 0 to the mask number for the layers. A value of 0indicates that there is no maskconstraint on the net. A non-zero valueindicates that all wiring on the netshould be created on the specified mask.Layers that do not support the specifiedvalue will be treated as unconstrained.

options.name: -ndr_si_length_limit
options.description: Table of layer length pairs, "M1 1.0, M2 2.0"

options.name: -net
options.description: Net name, wild card, or net type

options.name: -one_side_spacing
options.description: Specify the layer range that the onesidespacing constraint should be applied on. For example, 3:4 means that the constraint should be applied on M3 and M4.

options.name: -shield_side
options.description: Number of sides to route shield

options.name: -skip_antenna_fix
options.description: Skip antenna fix for this net

options.name: -stripe_layer_range
options.description: Specify the layer range that accommodate different StripeLayerRanges for different secondary PG netson. For example, 3:4 means that the constraint should be applied on M3 and M4.

options.name: -top_preferred_routing_layer
options.description: <layer_number> Top routing layer for the object

options.name: -top_preferred_shielding_layer
options.description: <layer_number> Top shielding layer for the object
